strings.ios.activeCall.expiredTimersMessage: All timers from this call have expired. Would you like to clear them?
strings.ios.activeCall.exportUnavailableMessage: Session data is no longer available.
strings.ios.activeCall.permissionRequiredMessage: MedicLog needs %@ access for this feature. Tap Open Settings to enable it.
strings.ios.activeCall.reconciliationBannerTitle: Entries may differ — tap to resolve
strings.ios.activeCall.tutorialEndCall: To end the call, tap 'End Call' at the top. You'll be asked to confirm before ending.
strings.ios.activeCall.tutorialQuickEntry: Use the Quick Entry buttons to rapidly log common interventions like IV access, oxygen, or CPR.
strings.ios.activeCall.tutorialReport: Tap 'Report' to generate a MIST format radio report for hospital handoff.
strings.ios.activeCall.tutorialTimers: Double-tap any medication timer to Redose, Snooze, or Delete it.
strings.ios.activeCall.tutorialWelcome: Welcome to your active call screen! This shows medication timers, quick entry buttons, and your call log.
strings.ios.addCustomTag.iconFooter: Select an emoji to display next to your tag
strings.ios.addEditDestination.capabilitiesFoote: Select tags that describe this destination's capabilities.
strings.ios.addEditDestination.notesPlaceholder: e.g., ER entrance on south side
strings.ios.addEditDestination.searchInMapsButto: Can't find it? Search in Maps
strings.ios.addEditDestination.searchInMapsHint: Copy the address in Maps and it auto-fills when you come back
strings.ios.addEditDestination.useCurrentLocatio: For bases or when you're at the destination
strings.ios.addEntry.containsPHIHint: Patient name, SSN, DOB, address, etc.
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.calculatedVi: Derived clinical scores calculated automatically from each vitals set. Disabled scores are not logged and do not appear in reports.
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.cincinnatiDe: 3-item yes/no: facial droop, arm drift, speech
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.clinicalProt: Select the stroke screening scale used by your agency. This determines the graphical scoring tool shown when logging a stroke screen procedure.
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.cppToggleCap: Auto-activates on head trauma or TBI keywords
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.fastedScoreR: FAST-ED total score 0-9. Default threshold ≥4 for stroke alert.
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.lamsScoreRan: LAMS total score 0-5. Default threshold ≥3 for suspected LVO.
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.lvoThreshold: Score at or above this threshold will show LVO (Large Vessel Occlusion) warning, suggesting transport to Comprehensive Stroke Center.
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.noneDescript: Freeform score entry for non-standard scales
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.raceScoreRan: RACE total score 0-9. Default threshold ≥5 for suspected LVO.
strings.ios.agencyClinicalProtocols.title: Clinical Protocols
strings.ios.agencyConfig.introMessage: Configure your agency settings. Tap a category to view and edit its settings.
strings.ios.agencyConfig.title: एजेन्सी कन्फिगरेसन
strings.ios.agencyDispatch.dispatchMessagesFoote: Create dispatch templates to auto-parse incoming messages. Use the setup wizard to configure Shortcuts automation.
strings.ios.agencyDispatch.shortcutsFooter: iOS Shortcuts can automate dispatch workflows, like auto-starting a call when a dispatch SMS arrives.
strings.ios.agencyDispatch.title: Dispatch र Incident Tracking
strings.ios.agencyFeatures.destinationsTabCaptio: Show Destinations in navigation bar and settings
strings.ios.agencyFeatures.emailAppChangedAlertM: %@ is no longer installed. Email preference has been reset to System Default.
strings.ios.agencyFeatures.enhancedOcrFooter: Optional cloud-assisted photo scanning using Anthropic's Claude AI. Requires an Anthropic API key and HIPAA BAA for clinical use.
strings.ios.agencyFeatures.featuresFooter: Enable or disable the Destinations feature. When disabled, the Destinations tab and settings will be hidden. Choose your preferred navigation app for opening addresses and destinations.
strings.ios.agencyFeatures.navAppChangedAlertMes: %@ is no longer installed. Navigation preference has been reset to Apple Maps.
strings.ios.agencyFeatures.preferredEmailClientC: Shown on Hospital Handoff send button
strings.ios.agencyFeatures.straightLineDistanceC: Use straight-line distance instead of road distance. Recommended for air transport operations.
strings.ios.agencyFeatures.title: सुविधा र Navigation
strings.ios.agencyHandoff.demographicsReminderCa: Prompt for patient demographics when reopening calls
strings.ios.agencyHandoff.endOfCallReportCaption: What to prompt when ending a call
strings.ios.agencyHandoff.sectionFooter: Control where the hospital handoff report is available. The report provides a structured bedside transfer summary with vitals trends and interventions.
strings.ios.agencyHandoff.showInShareMenuCaption: Include hospital handoff in the Share & Export screen
strings.ios.agencyHandoff.title: Hospital Handoff र रिपोर्टिङ
strings.ios.agencyIdentity.title: एजेन्सी पहिचान
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.disableAlertMessage:
Disabling PHI warnings removes all safety prompts when sharing patient information via non-secure methods.

Only disable if your agency policy explicitly allows unencrypted PHI transmission.

You and your agency assume full liability for any unprotected data transmissions.
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.phiDisabledBannerBody: Protected Health Information safety prompts are OFF. All data transmitted via non-AirDrop methods will proceed without any PHI warning dialogs.
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.phiDisabledLiabilityBo: By disabling PHI warnings, you and your agency accept full responsibility for any unencrypted transmission of patient data. MedicLog will not prompt before sending PHI via unsecured methods. This decision is yours — ensure your agency policy explicitly permits this.
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.phiDisabledLiabilityTi: YOU ASSUME ALL RISK AND LIABILITY
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.phiWarningsDescription: When enabled, sharing actions display safety warnings if Protected Health Information (PHI) is detected. This is a HIPAA safety feature.
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.phiWarningsToggleCapti: Safety prompts when sharing patient data
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.title: गोपनीयता र सुरक्षा
strings.ios.agencySupport.crashLoggingCaption: Automatically log actions to help debug crashes
strings.ios.agencySupport.disabledBullet2: Crashes cannot be reported (no data saved)
strings.ios.agencySupport.disabledBullet3: You can still manually report issues using "Report Issue" button in Support
strings.ios.agencySupport.enabledBullet1: App logs your actions in the background (button taps, navigation, screen changes)
strings.ios.agencySupport.enabledBullet2: If app crashes, you'll be asked to send a crash report on restart
strings.ios.agencySupport.enabledBullet3: You ALWAYS choose whether to send
strings.ios.agencySupport.enabledBullet5: Patient identifying information (name, age, sex) is NEVER logged
strings.ios.agencySupport.enabledBullet6: Medical data (medications, vitals) may be logged to help debug crashes
strings.ios.agencySupport.testDataToolsCaption: Display test data generator in Settings → Support. Agencies can disable this for production environments.
strings.ios.agencySupport.title: सहायता र Diagnostics
strings.ios.aiParsing.acknowledgeHipaaHint: Acknowledge the HIPAA compliance statement above to enable.
strings.ios.aiParsing.addApiKeyHint: Add an Anthropic API key above to enable.
strings.ios.aiParsing.apiKeyStorageNote: Your API key is stored securely in the iOS Keychain and never leaves your device except when making API calls to Anthropic.
strings.ios.aiParsing.baaAcknowledgmentToggleLab: I understand my organization's responsibilities regarding HIPAA compliance for this feature.
strings.ios.aiParsing.costBody: You pay Anthropic directly — approximately $0.001–0.003 per photo. A typical shift using 10–20 photos costs under $0.06. MedicLog takes no cut.
strings.ios.aiParsing.fallbackNote: Falls back to on-device OCR automatically when offline or if the API is unavailable.
strings.ios.aiParsing.hipaaCheckWithAdminNote: If you are unsure whether your organization has a BAA in place, check with your agency administrator or compliance officer before enabling this feature.
strings.ios.aiParsing.hipaaComplianceBody: Use of this feature with patient data requires you or your organization to have a signed Business Associate Agreement (BAA) with Anthropic. Individual API keys obtained from console.anthropic.com are not covered by a BAA by default.
strings.ios.aiParsing.howItWorksBody: This feature uses Claude, Anthropic's AI, to analyze monitor screen and medication list photos for more accurate data extraction than on-device processing. Photos are transmitted to Anthropic's API over an encrypted HTTPS connection, analyzed, and immediately discarded by Anthropic. Whether a local copy is saved to your session log is controlled separately in Session Settings.
strings.ios.aiParsing.howToGetApiKeyButton: How to get an API key
strings.ios.aiParsing.includeDoseFreqFooterOff: Only medication names will be extracted from photos (recommended for EMS).
strings.ios.aiParsing.includeDoseFreqFooterOn: Medication names, doses, and frequencies will be extracted from photos.
strings.ios.aiParsing.removeKeyAlertMessage: This will remove your stored API key and disable Claude Vision OCR.
strings.ios.apgarScore.title: APGAR स्कोर
strings.ios.apiKeyHelp.costEstimateBody: Each monitor photo costs approximately $0.001–0.003 to process. A typical shift using 10–20 photos costs under $0.06. You are billed directly by Anthropic — MedicLog takes no cut.
strings.ios.apiKeyHelp.hipaaBody: If you are using this feature with patient data in a clinical setting, your organization must have a signed Business Associate Agreement (BAA) with Anthropic. Standard API accounts do not include a BAA. Contact Anthropic's enterprise team or your agency's compliance officer for guidance.
strings.ios.apiKeyHelp.step2: Create an account or sign in
strings.ios.apiKeyHelp.step5: Copy the key and paste it in MedicLog
strings.ios.apiKeyHelp.whyByokBody: Bring Your Own Key means you pay Anthropic directly. No middleman, no markup, no subscription. You control your API usage and costs.
strings.ios.backgroundLogging.controlDescription: Nothing is ever sent automatically - you always choose whether to submit
strings.ios.backgroundLogging.privacyDescription: Patient identifying information (name, age, sex) is NEVER logged
strings.ios.backgroundLogging.question: Enable background crash logging to help improve MedicLog's reliability?
strings.ios.backgroundLogging.title: MedicLog सुधार गर्न मद्दत गर्नुहोस्
strings.ios.backgroundLogging.transparencyDescri: You can view log contents before sending any report
strings.ios.backgroundLogging.whatsLoggedDescrip: Button taps, navigation, screen changes - helps debug crashes
strings.ios.callDetail.reopenNoActiveCallMessage: This will reopen this call as your active call so you can continue logging entries.
strings.ios.callDetail.reopenWithActiveCallMessa:
This will end your current active call and reopen this call for continued logging.

Your current call will be saved to history.
strings.ios.callDetail.title: कल विवरण
strings.ios.callHistory.swipeTipMessage: Swipe left to delete, swipe right to edit
strings.ios.callIssuePickerView.noPastCallsMessa: Call history is empty. Complete a call to report an issue against it.
strings.ios.chiefComplaint.customSectionFooter: Type a complaint not listed above, or edit a voice/list selection.
strings.ios.chiefComplaint.micPermissionRequired: माइक अनुमति आवश्यक — सेटिङ्समा सक्षम गर्नुहोस्
strings.ios.chiefComplaint.title: मुख्य गुनासो
strings.ios.cincinnatiScale.armDriftHint: One arm drifts down compared to the other
strings.ios.cincinnatiScale.facialDroopHint: One side of face does not move as well
strings.ios.cincinnatiScale.instructions: Ask the patient to smile, hold arms out, and repeat a simple sentence.
strings.ios.cincinnatiScale.speechHint: Slurs words, uses wrong words, or cannot speak
strings.ios.clinicalDashboard.enterVitalsHint: Enter vitals to see clinical scores.
strings.ios.configExportView.agencyToggleCaption: Agency name, logo, destinations, protocols, dispatch templates
strings.ios.configExportView.headerSubtitle: Create a file to transfer your complete setup to another device or share with a colleague.
strings.ios.configExportView.partialExportFooter: Partial exports use the standard .mlconfig format. Export All produces a complete master file.
strings.ios.configExportView.personalToggleCapti: Display preferences, quick entry config, vitals settings, Watch settings
strings.ios.configPreviewView.overwriteWarning: This will overwrite matching settings on this device. Your name, ID, and personal info will not be changed.
strings.ios.contactQR.subtitle: Show this QR to medics so they can send you encrypted files
strings.ios.contactQR.title: मेरो सम्पर्क QR
strings.ios.correctionReasonSheet.sectionFooter: The original entry will be preserved for the audit trail. Providing a reason is optional but recommended.
strings.ios.crashReportPrompt.privacyNotice: Patient identifying information (name, age, sex) is never included. Only actions and navigation are logged. Report data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (HTTPS).
strings.ios.crashReportPrompt.sendReportQuestion: Would you like to send a crash report to help improve MedicLog?
strings.ios.crashReportPrompt.unexpectedCloseMes: MedicLog closed unexpectedly during your last session.
strings.ios.createProfile.copyCurrentProfileFoot: Copies agency name, unit number, employee info, and incident format from your current profile.

strings.ios.createProfile.duplicateNameWarning: A profile with this name already exists.
strings.ios.createProfile.title: नयाँ प्रोफाइल
strings.ios.dataSharing.configurationSharingFoot: Export your complete MedicLog setup (settings, medications, destinations) as a single file, or import a configuration from any .mlconfig or .mlformulary file.
strings.ios.dataSharing.exportPreferencesFooter: Configure default export formats for call logs and reports.
strings.ios.dataSharing.importInvalidFile: The file could not be read as a valid MedicLog import file.
strings.ios.dataSharing.importUnknownType: Unrecognized file type: "%@". Expected mlconfig, mlconfig-master, or mlformulary.
strings.ios.dataSharing.intro: Control how call logs and configurations are exported and shared.
strings.ios.dataSharing.title: डेटा र साझेदारी
strings.ios.decryption.errorDecryptionFailed: Decryption failed. File may be corrupted.
strings.ios.decryption.errorInvalidQR: Invalid QR code. Please scan the encryption key QR.
strings.ios.decryption.errorKeyDerivationFailed: Failed to derive key from code
strings.ios.decryption.senderDisplayQRHint: Sender will display QR after sending
strings.ios.decryptionCodeQR.keepVisibleHint: Keep this screen visible while they scan
strings.ios.decryptionCodeQR.subtitle: Receiver scans this to save the code for when your email arrives
strings.ios.decryptionCodeQR.title: Decryption Code QR
strings.ios.demographicsPrompt.subtitle: This call is missing patient demographics
strings.ios.demographicsPrompt.title: बिरामी जानकारी थप्ने?
strings.ios.destinationSettings.deleteAlertMessa: Are you sure you want to delete '%@'? This cannot be undone.
strings.ios.destinationSettings.qrShareHint: Scan with another device running MedicLog to import this destination
strings.ios.destinationSettings.qrTooLargeDescri: This destination has too much data for a QR code. Use AirDrop or email to share.
strings.ios.destinationSettings.sectionDescripti: Add and manage hospitals, bases, landing zones, and other destinations. These will appear in the Destinations tab for quick navigation.
strings.ios.destinations.calculatingDescription: तपाईंको स्थान खोज्दै र दूरी नाप्दै
strings.ios.destinations.emptyDescription: Add hospitals, bases, and other destinations in Settings to enable quick navigation.
strings.ios.destinations.privacy.navigationHando: When you tap Navigate, your location and destination are sent to Apple Maps (or Google Maps) for turn-by-turn directions. This is handled by the maps app, not MedicLog.
strings.ios.destinations.privacy.neverStoredDesc: Your location is used to calculate distances and then immediately discarded. MedicLog never stores your location.
strings.ios.destinations.privacy.oneTimeDescript: MedicLog requests your location once when you tap 'Find Closest'. This is not continuous tracking.
strings.ios.destinations.privacy.yourControlDesc: You can disable location features in Settings. Without location access, you can still browse and manually select destinations.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.chooseMethodSubtitle: We need a sample to learn your format.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.chooseMethodTitle: How do you receive run numbers?
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.clipboardErrorMessage: No text found on clipboard. Copy a message first, then tap Continue.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.doneMessage: Try it with your next dispatch message.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.haveCopyButton: I have a text or email to copy
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.introMessage:
MedicLog can automatically detect run numbers from dispatch messages.

This works two ways:
• Copy & paste — copy a dispatch message, open MedicLog, run number fills in
• Shortcuts automation — run numbers detected instantly in the background
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pasteMessageInstructio:
Switch to your Messages, Email, or CAD app and copy a message that contains a run number.

Then come back here and tap Continue.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pastePermissionExplana:
iOS asks "Allow Paste?" every time MedicLog reads a copied dispatch message.

Grant permission once in Settings and it won't ask again.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pastePermissionSetting: In your MedicLog settings, look for:
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pastePermissionWorkflo: Copy dispatch → open MedicLog → run number fills in automatically, no popup.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.radioDispatchHint: Radio dispatch, CAD, or other non-text sources — use "type an example."
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.savedMessage:
MedicLog will now recognize run numbers like %@ when you copy a dispatch message and open the app.

With Shortcuts automation, dispatch messages can also be detected automatically in the background — no copying needed.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.shortcutsOfferMessage:
iOS Shortcuts can automatically detect dispatch messages and send the run number to MedicLog — no copying needed.

This requires a one-time setup in the Shortcuts app.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.shortcutsRequirementNo: Requires iOS 16 or later. Test by having someone send a message with your dispatch format.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.title: Dispatch सेटअप
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.typeExampleInstruction: Enter a real or example run number exactly as it appears.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.walkthroughStep1: Open the Shortcuts app (we'll take you there)
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.walkthroughStep2: Tap the Automation tab at the bottom
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.walkthroughStep4: Scroll down and choose "Message" as trigger
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.walkthroughStep5: Tap "Sender" and select your dispatch number
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.walkthroughStep8: Tap "Shortcut Input" and change it to "Message"
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.walkthroughStep9: Turn off "Ask Before Running" for hands-free use
strings.ios.dispatchTagger.instructionsLabel:
Tap words to select, then assign a field type.
Tap adjacent words to extend selection.
strings.ios.dispatchTemplates.emptyStateMessage: Create a template by pasting a dispatch message and tagging the fields you want to extract.
strings.ios.dispatchTemplates.howTemplatesWorkBo: Each template matches a specific dispatch message format. When you receive a dispatch message, MedicLog checks each active template to extract the run number, unit, address, and other fields.
Create separate templates for each type of message you receive (e.g., primary dispatch, update, mutual aid).
strings.ios.dispatchTemplates.templatesSectionFo: Active templates are used to parse incoming dispatch messages. Swipe to delete.
strings.ios.displayPreferences.displaySettingsIn: Customize display settings for timers, timestamps, dates, and vitals throughout the app
strings.ios.displayPreferences.groupActiveCallEn: Show entries grouped by type during active calls instead of chronological order
Group Active Call Entries by Type
strings.ios.displayPreferences.groupDetailEntrie: Show entries grouped by type when reviewing past call details
strings.ios.displayPreferences.groupHistoryEntri: Show call history grouped by type instead of chronological order
strings.ios.displayPreferences.groupMedicationsB: Group medications by clinical use (Cardiac, Respiratory, etc.) instead of alphabetical
strings.ios.displayPreferences.keepScreenAwakeCa: Prevents screen from dimming during active calls
strings.ios.displayPreferences.lockedTo24Hour: Locked to 24-hour while UTC is enabled
strings.ios.displayPreferences.militaryDateCapti: Display dates as 14JAN2026 (otherwise uses system locale)
strings.ios.displayPreferences.nightRedCaption: Night Red dims screen and applies a red overlay — preserves night adaptation. Use for low-light EMS operations.
strings.ios.displayPreferences.nvgGreenCaption: NVG Green applies a green overlay compatible with AN/PVS-14 phosphor. Forces dark mode base and minimum brightness.
strings.ios.displayPreferences.showCallTimerCapt: Displays elapsed call time in the timer grid
strings.ios.displayPreferences.showMedicationTim: Displays countdown timers for medications and procedures
strings.ios.displayPreferences.systemThemeCaptio: System follows your device's Display & Brightness setting
strings.ios.displayPreferences.timestampIntro: Customize how timestamps and dates are displayed
strings.ios.displayPreferences.title: Display प्राथमिकताहरू
strings.ios.displayPreferences.useUTCCaption: Recommended for flight medics and cross-timezone operations
strings.ios.dnrCameraView.cameraAccessRequiredMe: MedicLog needs camera access to photograph DNR/POLST documents. Please enable it in Settings.
strings.ios.dripCalculator.enterValuesPrompt: Enter concentration, weight, and dose rate to calculate
strings.ios.dripCalculator.invalidWeightWarning: Enter a valid weight for weight-based dosing
strings.ios.dripCalculator.pumpFailedButton: My pump has failed - Log it
strings.ios.dripCalculator.title: Drip Calculator
strings.ios.duplicateReview.reviewCarefullyWarni: Review carefully: This affects dosage totals and cannot be undone easily
strings.ios.duplicateReview.title: दोहोरो समीक्षा
strings.ios.editEntry.correctionFailedMessage: Unable to correct entry — original not found.
strings.ios.editEntry.photoCannotChangeMessage: Photos cannot be changed. Delete this entry and take a new photo if needed.
strings.ios.editEntry.typeChangeAccessMessage: IV access data '%1$@ %2$@' will be moved to notes.
strings.ios.editEntry.typeChangeActionMessage: Entry text '%@' will be moved to notes.
strings.ios.editEntry.typeChangeMedicationMessag: Medication data '%@' will be moved to notes.
strings.ios.editEntry.typeChangeMonitoringMessag: Rhythm '%@' will be moved to notes.
strings.ios.editEntry.typeChangeVitalsMessage: Vital sign '%1$@: %2$@' will be moved to notes.
strings.ios.editMedication.doseSequenceCaption: Pre-fills dose amounts in order across repeated administrations. Step 1 is the first dose, Step 2 the second, and so on.
strings.ios.editMedication.doseSequenceFallbackC: Used as fallback when the dose sequence is empty or disabled.
strings.ios.editMedication.timerWillStartCaption: Timer will start at %@ when this medication is logged
strings.ios.editPatientMedication.title: औषधि सम्पादन
strings.ios.editProfile.duplicateNameWarning: A profile with this name already exists.
strings.ios.editProfile.incidentNumberFooter: The pattern used to detect run numbers from clipboard text.
strings.ios.editProfile.notFoundMessage: This profile could not be loaded. It may have been deleted.
strings.ios.emailSMSView.encryptedTransferSubtit: Send file and code separately for security
strings.ios.emailSMSView.scanQRToSaveCaption: Receiver can scan this QR to save the code for later
strings.ios.emailSMSView.sendCodeSeparatelyCapti: Send this code via SMS (separate from file)
strings.ios.entryRow.tapToEditAndFix: सम्पादन र सुधार गर्न ट्याप गर्नुहोस्
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.chartFormatCaption: Chief Complaint / History / Assessment / Rx / Transport
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.exportFormatsFoote: Disable formats you don't use to simplify the export menu. At least one format must remain enabled.
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.exportOptionsFoote: Photos may contain identifiable patient information, injuries, or medical details. When disabled, photo entries will show as placeholders in exports.
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.noteFormatsFooter: Enable clinical note formats for reviewing past calls. Formats appear as a toolbar button in Call Detail view.
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.phiWarningBody1: Exported files may contain Protected Health Information (PHI) including patient demographics, medical history, and treatment details.
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.phiWarningBody2: You are responsible for ensuring exports are transmitted securely and only to authorized recipients in compliance with HIPAA regulations.
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.photoWarningAlertM:
Photos may contain HIGH-RISK Protected Health Information including patient faces, visible injuries, medical equipment, and medication packaging.

You are responsible for ensuring photo exports are transmitted securely and only to authorized recipients in compliance with HIPAA regulations.
strings.ios.fastedScale.instructions: Score each finding 0-2. Total ≥%lld suggests Large Vessel Occlusion.
strings.ios.gcsPicker.discardAlertMessage: You have unsaved GCS scores. Discard them?
strings.ios.gcsPicker.title: GCS Calculator
strings.ios.genericScale.instructions: Enter the stroke screening score from your agency's protocol.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.airDropDetail: Share call logs directly to nearby Apple devices. Fast and secure peer-to-peer transfer.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.autoDetectionDetail: When you paste or type dispatch text, MedicLog extracts run numbers and patient info automatically.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.bedsideTransferDetai: Generate a QR code for the receiving crew to scan. Transfers patient data securely in seconds.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.cardiacDetail: Quick access to CPR, defibrillation, cardioversion. Tap or voice log cardiac interventions.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.copyReportDetail: Tap Copy to put the MIST report on your clipboard. Paste into radio notes or hospital notification.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.countPulseRespDetail: Tap Count Pulse or Count Resp in Vitals. Timer helps you count for 15 seconds and multiplies automatically.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.creatingTemplatesDet: Go to Settings > Dispatch Setup. Add templates that match your dispatch center's SMS format.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.dispatchAutoFillDeta: Set up SMS templates in Settings to auto-populate run numbers and patient info from dispatch texts.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.doubleTapActionsDeta: Double-tap any timer to access quick actions: Redose, Snooze 1min, Withhold, or Dismiss.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.editingProfilesDetai: Tap the pencil icon on any profile to edit name, ID, unit number, or agency.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.encryptedTransferDet: Export as .mlshare file with password protection. AES-256 encryption for HIPAA compliance.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.ivioAccessDetail: Log IV catheters and IO needles. Use the body diagram to mark placement sites.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.keyboardShortcutsDet: With external keyboard: Cmd+N for new entry, Cmd+T for timers, Cmd+V for vitals.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.medicationsDetail: Tap a medication button or use voice to log. Auto-starts medication timers when configured.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.mistFormatDetail: Auto-generated report: Mechanism/Medical complaint, Injuries/Illness, Signs/Symptoms, Treatment given.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.multiProviderModeDet: Add crew members to a call. Each entry is attributed to the provider who made it.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.notesDetail: Add free-text notes. Toggle Chief Complaint to categorize the call type.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.offlineModeDetail: Watch works independently when iPhone is out of range. Syncs when reconnected.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.pdfCsvExportDetail: Export call logs as PDF for ePCR systems, or CSV for spreadsheet analysis.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.perProfileSettingsDe: Each profile can have different quick entry buttons, timer colors, and medication favorites.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.proceduresDetail: Document procedures like intubation, splinting, wound care, and more.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.qrCodesDetail: Generate QR codes for quick handoffs. Scan with another MedicLog device to import.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.qrSharingDetail: The receiving device scans your QR code. Data is encrypted and never touches any server.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.redoseDetail: Logs another dose of the same medication and restarts the timer.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.runNumbersDetail: Enter manually or paste from dispatch SMS. MedicLog auto-detects common run number formats.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.sampleTemplatesDetai: Templates support placeholders like {RUN}, {AGE}, {SEX}, {CHIEF}. See examples in Dispatch Setup.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.shareReportDetail: Share via AirDrop, Messages, or other apps. Useful for hospital pre-notification.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.snoozeDetail: Extends the timer by 1 minute without logging a dose. Useful when patient is stable.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.startingACallDetail: Tap 'Start Call' on the home screen. Optionally enter run number, patient info, or paste dispatch text.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.swipeGesturesDetail: Swipe left on call history rows to delete. Swipe right on profiles for more options.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.switchingProfilesDet: Tap your profile in Settings to switch between saved profiles. Useful for different agencies or roles.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.syncDetail: Watch and iPhone stay in sync automatically. Entries made on Watch appear on iPhone instantly.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.timerColorsDetail: Customize timer appearance in Settings. Colors help distinguish medication categories at a glance.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.transportTimesDetail: Hospital handoff includes transport times: dispatch, arrival, depart scene, arrive destination.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.vitalsDetail: Tap Vitals to open the form, or speak values like 'BP 120 over 80, pulse 95'.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.voiceLoggingDetail: Raise your wrist and speak. The Watch logs medications, vitals, and notes hands-free.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.voiceTipsDetail: Speak naturally: 'Narcan 2 milligrams nasal' or 'BP 120 over 80'. MedicLog understands medical terms.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.watchAutoLaunchDetai: Watch app opens automatically when you start a call on iPhone. Configurable in Settings.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.withheldDetail: Logs that a scheduled dose was intentionally withheld. Documents clinical decision-making.

strings.ios.importLog.actionStartNewCall: Start New Call with This Data
strings.ios.importLog.confirmMsgContinueCall: This will make the imported call your active call. You'll continue logging from where %@ left off.
strings.ios.importLog.confirmMsgImportToHistory: This will add the imported call to your call history as a completed call. You can review it later.
strings.ios.importLog.confirmMsgMergeWithActive: This will combine %1$lld entries from %2$@ with your %3$lld entries. All entries will be attributed to their original logger.
strings.ios.importLog.confirmMsgReplaceActive: ⚠️ This will END your current call and make the imported call active. Your current call (%lld entries) will be saved to history.
strings.ios.importLog.confirmMsgStartNewCall: You'll enter YOUR run number and start a new call with %1$lld entries from %2$@. Attribution will be preserved.
strings.ios.importLog.descContinueCall: Keep sender's run number and continue logging
strings.ios.importLog.descImportToHistory: Add to call history as a completed call
strings.ios.importLog.descMergeWithActive: Combine entries with your current active call (multi-medic)
strings.ios.importLog.descReplaceActive: End your current call and make this your active call
strings.ios.importLog.descStartNewCall: Enter YOUR run number, import their entries
strings.ios.importLog.errorNoActiveCallToMerge: No active call to merge into. Start a call first, then re-import.
strings.ios.incidentNumbers.formatDescription: Define a pattern for incident/run numbers. Use # for digits, any other character stays literal.
strings.ios.incidentNumbers.sectionDescription: Configure how your agency tracks incident/run numbers for calls.
strings.ios.incidentNumbers.useToggleDescription: Enable this if your agency assigns incident/run numbers to calls. When disabled, the run number field will be hidden from the start call screen.

strings.ios.issueReport.notIncluded2: Vital signs values (blood pressure, heart rate, etc.)

strings.ios.languageSettings.feedbackFooter: Help improve translations for EMS professionals worldwide. Reports are reviewed by bilingual community members.

you looked after me."

strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.agencyFormatNote: Your agency's dispatch format may vary. You can set up SMS parsing templates in Settings -> Dispatch Setup.
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.autoStartBody: Set up an automation that starts a MedicLog call when you receive a dispatch message:
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.autoStep1: In Shortcuts app, go to Automation tab
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.autoStep4: Choose 'Contains' and enter your dispatch keyword (e.g., 'RUN#' or 'DISPATCH')
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.autoStep5: Add action: 'Run Shortcut' -> select your MedicLog shortcut
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.autoStep6: Disable 'Ask Before Running' for automatic execution
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.bullet1: Auto-start a call when dispatch SMS arrives
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.bullet2: Quick-log entries via Siri voice commands
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.bullet3: Create home screen widgets for common actions
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.faq1Answer: Make sure MedicLog is installed and you've opened it at least once. Restart the Shortcuts app if needed.
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.faq1Question: Shortcut doesn't appear in Shortcuts app
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.faq2Answer: Check that 'Ask Before Running' is disabled. Also verify the message trigger matches your dispatch format exactly.
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.faq3Answer: A call must be active for entries to log. The shortcut will fail silently if no call is active.
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.overviewBody: MedicLog provides shortcuts that integrate with iOS Shortcuts app. You can use these to:
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.step2: Tap the + button to create new shortcut
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.step5: Configure the entry text and type
strings.ios.shortcutsHelp.tipLabel: Tip: You can add this shortcut to your home screen for one-tap access.
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.activeCallErrorMe: Cannot replace formulary during an active call. End the call first, or choose Merge instead.
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.createNewProfileD: Adds "%@ (Imported)" — your current profile is unchanged
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.destinationsFoote: New destinations are added to your list. Duplicates (matching addresses) are automatically skipped.
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.mergeFormularyFoo: New medications and equipment will be added. Existing items will be updated by name match.
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.mergeOptionDetail: Add new medications, update existing ones by name
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.newProfileInfoDet: Your existing profiles and data will not be modified.
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.newProfileInfoTit: A new profile will be created
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.overwriteCurrentP: Replaces current profile's settings in-place — profile name and call history preserved
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.overwriteProfileF: Your profile name and call history are not affected. Only settings, logo, and destinations are updated.
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.replaceAllOptionD: Wipe existing formulary and replace with imported data
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.replaceConfirmMes: This will wipe and replace your entire formulary. This cannot be undone.
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.replaceFormularyF: This will remove all current medications and equipment, replacing with imported formulary.
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.selectImportModeH: You must select an import mode before proceeding.
strings.ios.smartImportPreview.unrecognizedFileT:
Expected: mlconfig, mlconfig-master, or mlformulary
Found: %@
strings.ios.startCall.differentUnitMessage: Dispatch says Unit %1$@, but you're set to %2$@. Update your unit number?
strings.ios.startCall.identifierRequiredMessage: Please fill in at least one of: Employee Name, Employee ID, or Unit Number in Settings to ensure calls can be traced to a medic.
strings.ios.strokeScale.lvoLikely: LVO LIKELY — Consider Comprehensive Stroke Center
strings.ios.support.appResetCompleteAlertMessage: MedicLog has been reset to factory defaults.
strings.ios.support.dangerZoneFooter: Destructive operations that cannot be undone.
strings.ios.support.debuggingSectionFooter: Get help with MedicLog, report issues, or enable support logging to capture detailed diagnostics for troubleshooting.
strings.ios.support.loggingActiveBannerMessage: Logging app actions for debugging. Reproduce your issue, then toggle off to submit.
strings.ios.support.loggingInactiveHint: Enable to capture app actions for troubleshooting. No patient data is recorded.
strings.ios.support.tipsResetSuccessMessage: All tips reset - they will appear again
strings.ios.support.title: सहायता
strings.ios.support.trainingTestingFooter: Development and training tools. Disable in Agency Configuration for production use.
strings.ios.support.tutorialUnavailableAlertMess: End your active call first to use the tutorial.
strings.ios.supportLogSubmit.privacyNote: This log contains NO patient information. Only app actions, settings, and error messages are included. Data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (HTTPS).
strings.ios.t175Diagnostic.actionsFooter: Force Full Sync: requests full session from peer (legacy path). Send Reconciliation: triggers T175 sequence reconciliation (T175 path). Simulate Gap: drops next 3 outbound operations to test gap-fill logic (DEBUG builds only). All disabled when Watch not reachable.
strings.ios.t175Diagnostic.lastSyncFooter: Heartbeat timeout is 15 seconds. Orange = approaching or past timeout.
strings.ios.t175Diagnostic.operationLogFooter: Shows operations originated on THIS device. ACKed = peer confirmed receipt.
strings.ios.t175Diagnostic.protocolStatusFooter: Refreshes every 2 seconds. SyncEngine is active only during an active call.
strings.ios.t175Diagnostic.sequenceNumbersFooter: Pending = my ops the peer hasn't ACKed yet (queue depth). Gap Buffer = peer ops received out-of-order, waiting for sequence gap to fill.
strings.ios.tacticalMode.autoDaylightCaption: Automatically switch to tactical mode at night and back to daylight after sunrise. Select GPS / Solar below to use your location for actual sunrise/sunset times, or Manual for a fixed time window.
strings.ios.tacticalMode.locationAccessRequired: Requires location access. Grant access via Find Closest first.
strings.ios.tacticalMode.manualWindowCaption: MedicLog will switch to tactical mode after Night Start and return to daylight after Night End. Follows device clock — adjusts automatically when crossing time zones.
strings.ios.tacticalMode.masterToggleCaption: Enable Night Red and NVG Green low-light modes for ambulance operations
strings.ios.tacticalMode.nightRedCaption: Dims screen and applies a red overlay to preserve night adaptation
strings.ios.tacticalMode.nvgGreenCaption: For NVG-equipped operators. Off by default.
strings.ios.tacticalMode.shiftSpansCaption: Working a shift that spans sunrise or sunset? Leave Auto-Daylight off and use the toolbar button instead.
strings.ios.tacticalMode.title: Tactical Modes
strings.ios.tacticalMode.twilightBufferCaption: Switch to night mode this many minutes after sunset, and back to daylight this many minutes after sunrise.
strings.ios.termsOfService.acceptCheckboxLabel: I have read and accept the Terms of Use
strings.ios.termsOfService.scrollToBottomHint: Please scroll to the bottom to continue
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.ack1: I have read and understand these terms
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.ack2: I accept full responsibility for HIPAA compliance
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.ack3: I will use this app per my training and protocols
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.ack4: I will follow my organization's policies
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.ack5: I understand this is beta software with no warranty
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.ack6: I accept all risks of using this app
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.acknowledgment: BY TAPPING "I ACCEPT" BELOW, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT:
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.declineFootnot: If you do not accept these terms, tap "Decline" and do not use this app.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.importantNotic: IMPORTANT: READ CAREFULLY BEFORE USING THIS APP
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section1Body:
MedicLog is beta software under active development. While we implement security best practices including encryption, access controls, and PHI warnings, this software is provided for evaluation purposes.

THIS APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND.

We implement:
• Device encryption (iOS Data Protection)
• Encrypted transmission (AirDrop, secure channels)
• PHI warnings at export points
• Local-only storage (no cloud transmission)

However, YOU remain solely responsible for HIPAA compliance.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section2Body:
YOU (the user) are solely responsible for:
✓ Ensuring your use complies with HIPAA and applicable laws
✓ Following your organization's policies and procedures
✓ Properly handling Protected Health Information (PHI)
✓ Using device security (passcode, Face ID, encryption)
✓ Sharing data only with authorized personnel
✓ Maintaining patient confidentiality

The developer is NOT a Business Associate under HIPAA. We do not access, transmit, or store your patient data. All data remains on YOUR device.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section3Body:
This app is a documentation tool, NOT medical advice.

Always follow your training, protocols, and medical direction.

The developer is NOT LIABLE for:
• Clinical decisions made using this app
• Errors or omissions in documentation
• Medication dosing or treatment decisions
• Patient outcomes or adverse events
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section4Body:
• All data stored locally on YOUR device only
• YOU are responsible for device security
• Enable device passcode/biometrics (Settings → Face ID & Passcode)
• Device backups (iCloud/iTunes) may contain PHI - secure appropriately
• No cloud sync - developer cannot access your data
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section5Body:
When sharing call logs via AirDrop, email, or other methods:

YOU are responsible for:
✓ Verifying recipient is authorized to receive PHI
✓ Using secure transmission methods when available
✓ Following HIPAA minimum necessary standard
✓ Documenting disclosures per your organization's requirements

Inter-agency handoffs (fire→ambulance) include patient information. This is STANDARD EMS PRACTICE and medically necessary for continuity of care. MedicLog provides BETTER security than paper handoffs.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section6Body:
If using MedicLog as part of an organization:
✓ Obtain approval from your supervisor/compliance officer
✓ Follow organizational policies for documentation
✓ Report security incidents per your policies
✓ Understand EMS documentation requirements in your jurisdiction
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section7Body:
TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, THE DEVELOPER SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR:

• HIPAA violations or regulatory penalties
• Loss, corruption, or unauthorized access to data
• Clinical errors or patient harm
• Any damages arising from use or inability to use this app
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section8Body:
You agree to indemnify and hold harmless the developer from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from:

• Your use of this app
• Your violation of these terms
• Your violation of HIPAA or other regulations
• Clinical decisions or patient care activities
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section9Body: These terms may be updated for new versions. Major changes will require re-acceptance. Continued use constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

strings.ios.userInformation.contactSectionFooter: Email and phone enable sending/receiving call logs via Email/SMS.
strings.ios.userInformation.identifierRequiredWa: Enter at least Name or Employee ID
strings.ios.userInformation.identitySectionFoote: At least one identifier (Name, Employee ID, or Unit Number) is required.
strings.ios.userInformation.title: तपाईंको जानकारी
strings.ios.vitalsEntry.clinicalFlagsFooter: These scores will be logged on Save.
strings.ios.vitalsEntry.nilSessionAlertMessage: No active session. Vitals were not saved.
strings.ios.vitalsEntry.title: Vitals प्रविष्टि
strings.ios.vitalsSettings.collapsedPreviewCapti: This is exactly how vitals appear in collapsed timeline entries during active calls and in call history.
strings.ios.vitalsSettings.fieldVisibilityOrderF: Show or hide vital signs and drag to reorder. Order is reflected in the vitals entry form.
strings.ios.vitalsSettings.mathHintsDisabledFoot: Display calculation hints under relevant fields to help with quick reference math
strings.ios.vitalsSettings.physicalAssessmentFoo: When enabled, a Physical Findings row appears in the Vitals Entry form. Enable sub-categories to collect Pupils, Lung Sounds, and Skin Signs observations. Abnormal findings generate clinical flags.
strings.ios.vitalsSettings.radioReportFooter: When enabled, radio reports include first and current vital signs with trending arrows. When disabled, shows a reminder line only.
strings.ios.vitalsSettings.reassessmentReminderF: Auto-recurring timer in the active call timer grid. Starts after saving vitals and resets each time new vitals are recorded.
strings.ios.vitalsSettings.selectVitalsFooter: Enable vitals you want to see in collapsed view. Watch the preview above to ensure they fit on your screen.
strings.ios.vitalsSettings.title: Vitals सेटिङ्स
strings.ios.vitalsSettings.weightFooter: When a secondary unit is selected, the Patient Profile weight entry shows both a kg field and a secondary field side-by-side with live conversion. The unit selector is here — not in the weight entry row — to prevent accidental unit flips during transport.
strings.ios.voiceAdvancedSettings.rmsDescription: Amplitude floor below which audio frames are treated as silence. Lower values are more sensitive (more audio captured). Higher values trim more aggressively. Default: 0.010.
strings.ios.voiceAdvancedSettings.sectionDescrip: Advanced voice pipeline settings. Changing these values affects how the Watch classifies silence during recording. Use only for field troubleshooting.
strings.ios.voiceAdvancedSettings.title: Advanced भ्वाइस सेटिङ्स
strings.ios.voiceAliasList.clearAllAlertMessage: This will remove all %lld custom voice aliases. This cannot be undone.
strings.ios.voiceAliasList.disableLastAlertMessa: This will disable voice logging for this medication.
This will disable voice logging for %@. Continue?
strings.ios.voiceAliasList.emptyStateBody: Built-in medication aliases will appear here. Train custom aliases to improve recognition.
strings.ios.voiceAliasList.title: भ्वाइस पहिचान
strings.ios.voiceAliasTrainer.title: भ्वाइस Alias प्रशिक्षण
strings.ios.voiceInput.micPermissionDeniedMessag: MedicLog needs microphone access to record voice entries. Please enable it in Settings.
strings.ios.voiceInput.speechPermissionDeniedMes: Speech recognition access was denied. Please enable it in Settings to use voice logging.
strings.ios.voiceInput.speechPermissionRestricte: Speech recognition is restricted on this device.
strings.ios.voiceInput.title: भ्वाइस लग
strings.ios.voiceMedicationEntry.instructionBody:
Say each medication name clearly.
Separate with commas or "and".
strings.ios.voiceMedicationEntry.noMedsDetectedB: Try speaking more clearly, or add manually below
strings.ios.voiceMedicationEntry.title: भ्वाइस प्रविष्टि
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.autoPromoteDes: Minimum confidence score required before a voice medication entry is automatically accepted without medic review. Higher values require more complete voice input (drug name, dose, and route). Default: 0.85.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.autoPromoteWar: Adjusting this value may cause voice entries to be automatically accepted or rejected unexpectedly. Default (0.85) matches standard behavior.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.silenceThresho: How long to wait after speech stops before ending recording.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.spokenDetailDe: Short: drug name only. Full: drug name, dose, and route spoken after logging.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.stripSilenceDe: Strip silence from start and end of recording before sending to phone. Reduces transfer time.
strings.ios.voicePipelineSettings.title: भ्वाइस Pipeline
strings.ios.watchConfig.clickEntryDescription: Quick-tap actions on Watch during active calls. Medication and procedure items log structured entries with correct entrySource. Swipe to delete, drag to reorder.
strings.ios.watchConfig.connectedDescription: Apple Watch is connected and ready
strings.ios.watchConfig.crewAnnounceOffDescripti: Enable to announce medications and procedures over the phone speaker for ambient crew awareness.
strings.ios.watchConfig.crewAnnounceOnDescriptio: Phone announces medication, cardiac, and procedure entries over its speaker for ambient crew awareness. Excludes vitals and notes. Off by default.
strings.ios.watchConfig.disabledDescription: Apple Watch sync and communication are disabled. The Watch app will continue to run independently but will not receive new entries or timers from this phone.
strings.ios.watchConfig.hapticNormalDescription: Standard haptic patterns. Includes 30-second warnings and timer-specific patterns.
strings.ios.watchConfig.hapticStrongDescription: More urgent haptics with shorter intervals. Best for noisy environments where you need stronger alerts.
strings.ios.watchConfig.hapticSubtleDescription: Gentler haptics with longer intervals. 30-second warnings disabled. Best for less intrusive alerts.
strings.ios.watchConfig.notConnectedDescription: Apple Watch app is not running or out of range
strings.ios.watchConfig.notInstalledMessage: MedicLog was not found on your Apple Watch. Open the Watch app on your iPhone and install MedicLog to enable Watch sync.
strings.ios.watchConfig.notPairedMessage: Pair an Apple Watch with this iPhone first, then install the MedicLog Watch app.
strings.ios.watchConfig.sectionDescription: Configure Apple Watch connectivity and voice input behavior
strings.ios.watchConfig.sendWhisperMessage: Sends the offline transcription model to your Apple Watch (~77 MB, takes a few minutes over Bluetooth). Only needed once.
strings.ios.watchConfig.showWatchStatusDescripti: Display watch connectivity indicator on start call screen.
strings.ios.watchConfig.speakOnPhoneDescription: Phone speaker speaks the logged entry confirmation. Watch stays silent.
strings.ios.watchConfig.speakOnWatchDescription: Watch speaks the logged entry (drug name and timer) after phone confirms the recording.
strings.ios.watchConfig.timerPageOffDescription: Timer pages stay visible until you manually navigate away.
strings.ios.watchConfig.timerPageSecondsDescript: Automatically returns to home rings after %lld seconds of inactivity on a timer page.
strings.ios.watchConfig.timerUrgencyDescription: When a timer reaches this countdown, it automatically comes to the foreground on Apple Watch.
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceListLoadFailed: Could not load voice list from Watch
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceListNotConnected: Watch not connected — voice list unavailable
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceModeAutoDescription: Watch will automatically listen for voice input when you raise your wrist during an active call. Best for hands-free operation.
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceModeManualDescripti: Tap the LOG button to start voice input. Best for loud environments where background noise might trigger false recordings.
strings.ios.watchConfig.voicePipelineDescription: Silence threshold, strip silence, spoken detail, auto-promote
strings.ios.watchConfig.watchVoiceDescription: Choose which installed voice the Watch uses when speaking medication confirmations.
strings.ios.watchConfig.whisperSuccessMessage: Your Apple Watch can now transcribe offline.
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.clickEntry.d: One-tap quick entries for common interventions
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.configurable: Enable, disable, or adjust Watch settings any time in Settings → Watch Configuration
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.timers.descr: Medication and intervention timers with haptic alerts
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.timers.title: Live Timers
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.voice.descri: Speak entries from your wrist during active calls
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.voice.title: Voice Logging
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.question: Would you like to enable Apple Watch integration?
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.title: Apple Watch पत्ता लाग्यो
